Speaking aggressively to the young man
Laughing at the man in snakeskin

Skill 적절성: Requires linking the bald man's earlier food tampering to the elderly man's later suspicious signaling. 정답 근거: The elderly man watches the bald man's hand touch the burrito with intense suspicion before immediately ringing his bell to alert the others.
